name: Showcase Preview Hero
description: Full-width hero for blueprint detail pages with a faded screenshot backdrop, a crisp centered preview image, and a 'View Demo' call-to-action. Only renders when a screenshot asset exists.

default.description: Screenshot backdrop with gradient fade, crisp centered image, and primary CTA button

slots.backdrop: Faded and blurred screenshot as background with gradient overlay fading to var(--d-bg)
slots.preview-image: Crisp centered screenshot with rounded corners, border, and box-shadow
slots.cta: 'View Demo' primary button, opens demo in new tab

slots.backdrop: Faded/blurred screenshot with gradient overlay to var(--d-bg)
slots.preview-image: Crisp centered screenshot with border and shadow

visual_brief: Full-width section with the blueprint's screenshot rendered twice: once as a faded, blurred background filling the section with a gradient overlay that dissolves into var(--d-bg), and once as a crisp centered image with rounded corners, a 1px border in var(--d-border), and a prominent box-shadow. The crisp image sits above the faded backdrop, centered horizontally. Below the image is a primary-colored 'View Demo' button. The entire pattern only renders when a screenshot asset is available — no placeholder or empty state.

responsive.mobile: Preview image takes full width with minimal horizontal padding. CTA button is full-width. Backdrop gradient adjusted for smaller viewport.
responsive.tablet: Preview image constrained to 80% width, centered. CTA button at natural width. Comfortable vertical spacing.
responsive.desktop: Preview image centered with comfortable padding on both sides. CTA button at natural width. Generous vertical spacing above and below.
